name: Chris Wang
description: MCP tool configuration for Business Analyst — Integrations squad

filesystem.notes: Scoped to integration specs and documentation. No source code or infrastructure access.

github.notes: Read-only. Use for: reading existing API endpoint definitions, checking current v1 API behaviour, reading OpenAPI specs.

brave-search.notes: Use for: REST API design best practices, webhook delivery patterns, OpenAPI spec standards, rate limiting patterns

usage_guidance.filesystem: Read existing requirement sets (REQ-API2-*) before writing new ones — maintain ID sequence and consistent shall/should language.
usage_guidance.github: Read current v1 API implementation to understand actual behaviour before documenting v2 requirements. Never assume — verify against code.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Research standard patterns for webhook retry logic, API versioning, and rate limit response headers before specifying behaviour.

not_configured.confluence_api: Confluence publishing managed manually — Claude drafts requirements, Chris reviews and publishes
not_configured.jira_api: Jira managed manually — Chris creates and manages tickets in Jira UI
not_configured.salesforce: Salesforce read-only access via browser — customer account context provided manually to Claude as text
